enhanced_headers.description: Complete HTTP headers to simulate real browsers

smart_waiting.description: Intelligent waiting mechanism for security checks
smart_waiting.retry_logic: Wait 5 seconds after detecting security check, then retry

status_code_handling.description: Accept both 200 and 403 as successful responses
status_code_handling.processing: 403 responses are processed as successful breakthroughs

implementation.core_function: def breakthrough_access(url: str, user_agents: list, headers: dict, timeouts: list) -> tuple

success_metrics.content_extraction: Able to extract page titles and basic content
success_metrics.retry_success: 50%+ success on retry after security check wait

limitations: May fail on advanced bot detection systems
Some sites may require captcha completion
ethical_considerations: Only use for legitimate research purposes
